legend_symbols.means: DGPO Double General Purpose Outlet (fit for purpose as noted): (AB) Above Bench, (UB) Under Bench, (SK) Skirting
GPO Single General Purpose Outlet (fit for purpose as noted)
Data CAT6 (fit to purpose as noted)
Speakers — FITSTOP standard, mounting height OH-3200 to underside; 1x power + 1x CAT6 per speaker, wired to reception desk. (B) Black / (W) White. Qty: 4x
Feature Recessed LED Downlight — Aurora Tritone, ø100mm, IP44, 12W, 4000K, white, dimmable
Existing and/or new exit signs (E.U.S) — to BCA requirements
Feature Recessed LED Downlight @ Mirrors — Aurora Tritone, ø100mm, IP44, 9W, 4000K, white
Shower Recessed LED Downlight — Aurora, ø100mm, IP65, 12W, 4000K, white
Switch with dimmer (fit for purpose as noted)
Fans (wall mounted) — Renegade Industrial Fan / Remowam, 200mm, 3-speed, black
Air conditioning square ceiling diffuser — to mech engineer's spec, black
Air conditioning return air grille — to mech engineer's spec
Mechanical exhaust ventilation registers (fit for purpose)

items.note: Reception area: 'Dual DGPO (AB) + USB' x2 at reception counter = 2; amenities benches DGPO (AB) near basins x2 = 2; x2 DGPO above TV/digital clock labelled = counted under TV item; top-left storage/HMU area DGPO (AB) 1 = 1. Total ~5
Amenities/kitchenette zone (left-centre): DGPO (UB) labelled near cupboard/bench x2 = 2
Top wall (right of comms) DGPO (SK) 1; right wall DGPO (SK) 1; bottom-left near skiers/bikes DGPO (SK) 1; bottom-right wall DGPO (SK) 1 = 4

items.type: DGPO above TV + Digital Clock (separate typical detail)
items.note: Labelled 'x2 DGPO above TV and digital clock' in central/reception zone = 2

items.type: DGPO – wall mounted TV (top-left, client TV)
items.note: Top-left 'Power & Data for wall mounted TV (check client for exact requirements)' = 1 DGPO assumed
Top-left near HMU 'Allow power for HMU' GPO 1; right-top wall GPO 1; reception desk GPO 1; amenities GPO 1 = 4

Reception desk area data points ▽ x2 (main data point to modem in comms cupboard, plus reception data) = 2; speakers switch/data near reception 1 = 1. Total 3 (note: speaker CAT6 cabling counted under speakers)
Amenities/water cooler zone (left-centre) labelled 'FOUNTAIN POWER' = 1
Top-right wall labelled 'POWER FOR LED NEON SIGN' = 1

items.type: Power for Shopfront Signage (text-labelled, timer in EDB)
items.note: Bottom wall labelled 'POWER FOR SHOPFRONT SIGNAGE (allow for timer in EDB)' = 1
Reception requirements note: 'power x2 to iPads' and 'x2 dual DGPO with USB charger above desk' = 2 USB-related provisions

Legend states qty 4x but reception note says '6 gang plate for speakers (CAT6 hardwired)' and plan shows wall speakers: top-left/storage 1, left wall 1, right wall (W) 1, bottom-centre speakers switch zone 2, plus reception = approx 6 mounted speaker points across left/right/bottom walls. Density made exact count hard

104A shows multiple 'Light Switch refer RCP' labels: top-left 1, left wall (amenities) 3, fountain/void area 1, '3x gang lights switches' reception 1, speakers light switch 1 = ~7 switch locations (refer RCP for actual gangs)
103A RCP – rectangular panels in amenities/back-of-house corridor: amenities ceiling ~4, kitchenette/storage ~2 = approx 6. RCP density and small panel symbols limit precision

items.type: Feature Recessed LED Downlight 12W IP44 (Aurora Tritone, main areas)
items.note: 103A RCP main retail floor: arranged in grid across central training floor – top zone ~8, middle zone ~10, bottom/reception zone ~10 = approx 28. High-density grid, count is best estimate

items.type: Feature Recessed LED Downlight 9W IP44 @ Mirrors
items.note: 103A amenities – labelled '9W' near mirror downlights in toilet/shower rooms: 2x WC/shower rooms x ~2 = 4. Labelled 9W/12W cluster near amenities mirrors
103A – labelled 'IP65' and '2x fitting to be IP65 rated' in shower/amenities zones: Male shower 1-2, Female shower 1-2 = approx 4
103A – 'EXIT' shown top-left near stair 1, left-centre 'Exit sign only if required by certifier' 1, bottom-centre near entry 1 = 3 (some noted 'only if required by certifier')
103A – emergency lighting points distributed along egress paths: entry 1, amenities corridor 1, mid-floor 2 = approx 4 (legend defined, sparse symbols)
103A labelled FAN 1 (left wall), FAN 2 (right wall lower), FAN 3 (top-centre), FAN 4 (top-right) = 4
103A: 'x2 gang fans switch (fans 1+2)' and 'x2 gang fans switch (fans 3+4)' = 2 switch plates
103A RCP – square diffusers across ceiling: top zone 2, middle 2, lower 2 = approx 6 (mech, to engineer's spec)
103A RCP – cross-hatched return grilles: top-centre 1, middle 1, lower 1 = approx 3
103A amenities – exhaust registers in toilet/shower compartments (ceiling sensor activated): 2 amenities rooms = 2
103A – security dome camera symbols, legend defined; sparse placement entry/reception = approx 2
Top-left corner: 'Existing EDB – upgrade as required' + COMMS cupboard = 1 board location (confirm size adequate / relocate per notes)

overall_note: Latest revision of every sheet present is Rev 'A' (e.g. 103A, 104A) — no superseding B/later revisions found in this set, so all counts taken from A revisions. Power & Data taken from 104A; lighting/RCP from 103A. MAJOR LIMITATION: the RCP (103A) and Power plan (104A) are dense, small-scale (1:50 @ A2) raster images and many symbols (downlights in the retail grid, panels, diffusers) are too small/illegible to count exactly — all lighting/diffuser counts are best-estimate (low confidence) and should be verified against a higher-resolution drawing. Wattage labels (9W/12W/IP65) appear clustered near amenities confirming the three downlight variants but exact per-fitting allocation in the main floor grid could not be fully resolved. GPO/DGPO suffix variants (AB/UB/SK) were distinguished per legend but several symbols lacked a clearly legible suffix. Speaker count conflicts between legend (4x) and reception note (6 gang plate) — flagged. Many switch locations say 'refer RCP' meaning gang quantities must be cross-referenced. Recommend obtaining native CAD/vector PDF for a verified take-off.
